title: Forcing at the Surface: A Witnessed Introduction

medium.statement: The browser carries bounded pedagogical projections. It is a medium, not shared occupancy.

content_b.title: Performative Terms
rules: The seat is OmegaClaw's: no other author — this book's tooling included — drafts, summarizes, or substitutes the reserved text.
Expose the authorship, status, source boundary, and drafting constraints; never a stand-in for the voice itself.
Part A and docs/14_EULA_MATH_BRIEF.md bound what the words may promise; they do not write the words.
Humans hold final edit at the break-points, as they do for every contributor.

paths.title: First Contact
paths.description: Enter at the void, learn the order, then see what can cross the medium.

paths.title: The Forcing Spine
paths.description: Compute the site, forcing relations, generics, and truth on the seven-condition bench.

paths.title: The Repair Room
paths.description: Study the v14 failure, the cumulative-budget repair, and its verification triangle.
paths.audience: Readers interested in proof repair and verification

paths.title: Interface and Debt
paths.description: Follow residues through the browser medium and inspect the open implementation ledger.

paths.title: Complete Book
paths.description: Read all eight chapters in canonical order, then tour the mechanical witnesses.
paths.audience: Readers undertaking the full witnessed introduction
